'''Orvax''' was a terrestrial astronomical object<ref name="Convergence" /> located in the [[Orvax system]] in the [[Dalchon sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="Appendix" /> Orvax had damp ground and dark forests, which made it hard to see.<ref name="Convergence" />

{{Loc-stub}}
